name: Kalmar County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gules field of the Smaland-derived arms

description: A square red flag charged centrally with a gold six-pointed star, the historic emblem of Kalmar.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Kalmar County, derived from the medieval arms of the city of Kalmar combined with elements from the historic province of Smaland.

features.symbolism: the gules field of the historic Smaland provincial arms, on which the Kalmar charges are set
a gold six-pointed star on a red field, the historic emblem of Kalmar from the city's medieval arms.
